sentence: 有事找街坊邻居帮帮忙就好了。
pinyin: Yǒu shì zhǎo jiēfāng línjū bāng bāng máng jiù hǎo le.
english: If you need help, just ask the neighbors.

meaning: To go crazy; To go mad, to go crazy
sentence: 他听到这个消息差点儿发疯。
pinyin: Tā tīngdào zhège xiāoxi chàdiǎnr fāfēng.
english: He almost went crazy when he heard the news.
The two exchanged contact information with each other.

meaning: To strip naked, to strip nude
sentence: 孩子洗澡前把衣服脱光了。
pinyin: Háizi xǐzǎo qián bǎ yīfu tuōguāng le.
english: The child stripped off all his clothes before taking a bath.

sentence: 村里的老人相信巫术能治病。
pinyin: Cūn lǐ de lǎorén xiāngxìn wūshù néng zhìbìng.
english: The village elders believe witchcraft can cure illness.
